title: Peruvian Pilaf Bowl
description: A flavorful and aromatic Peruvian-inspired pilaf dish, perfect for a weeknight meal.
instructions: Heat the gooey in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the garlic and cook, stirring occasionally, for 2-3 minutes or until fragrant.
Add the pilaf and stir to coat with the garlic and gooey mixture.
Cook, stirring occasionally, for 5-7 minutes or until the pilaf is lightly toasted.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
